overall.description: Game engine footage from a driving simulator showing a military-style camouflaged truck driving on a rural Scottish highway at dusk. The vehicle follows and overtakes a blue sedan while approaching Edinburgh, with the historic Edinburgh Castle visible on the horizon against an overcast evening sky.

events.description: green directional sign for Edinburgh and Edinburgh Castle appears on left side of road

agents.ego_description: driving steadily on the rural highway following a blue sedan at moderate distance

notable_agents.action: blue sedan driving ahead in the same direction on the highway

entered.detail: two-lane asphalt highway stretching into the distance
line of trees with orange and red autumn foliage
historic stone castle visible on the horizon
metal guardrail running along the left side of the road
green highway directional sign indicating Edinburgh and Edinburgh Castle

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from a military truck driving on a rural highway at dusk. The vehicle follows a blue sedan down the asphalt road, flanked by autumn-colored trees and guardrails. Edinburgh Castle appears as a distant silhouette on the left horizon as the truck approaches a green directional road sign.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway approach to Edinburgh with overtaking maneuver

events.description: passing white Edinburgh city direction sign on the left
truck signals and moves to the left lane to overtake the blue sedan

agents.ego_description: closing distance on the blue sedan and executing a lane change to the left to overtake

notable_agents.action: blue sedan moving to the right lane as the truck overtakes on the left

entered.detail: white road sign with Edinburgh text indicating city center direction

segments.scene_description: The truck closes the distance on the blue sedan while passing road signage for Edinburgh. Edinburgh Castle grows larger on the left horizon. The driver signals and pulls into the left lane to overtake the sedan, which moves aside to the right lane.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway entering Edinburgh city limits with castle view

events.description: passing large white Welcome to Edinburgh sign on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: driving steadily on the clear highway after completing the overtake, approaching the city limits

entered.detail: large white rectangular sign reading Welcome to EDINBURGH

segments.scene_description: Having successfully overtaken the blue sedan, the truck continues along the highway toward Edinburgh. The historic Edinburgh Castle dominates the left skyline as a prominent stone structure. The vehicle passes the Welcome to Edinburgh city limits sign, officially entering the city as the road stretches ahead toward the urban center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a military truck as it travels from a rural highway into the urban outskirts of Edinburgh at dusk. It begins by following a blue sedan along an asphalt road flanked by autumn-colored trees, with the distant silhouette of Edinburgh Castle appearing on the left horizon. As the truck passes green directional signage, the castle grows larger in the skyline while the vehicle signals and pulls into the left lane to overtake the sedan. The scene then shifts as the truck accelerates past the car and continues forward, with the historic stone structure of the castle now dominating the left skyline. Finally, the camera passes a city limits sign, officially entering Edinburgh as the road stretches ahead toward the urban center.
